created.description: A timestamp from when the user type was created

createdBy.description: The user ID of the account that created the user type

default.description: A boolean value to indicate if this is the default user type

description.description: The human-readable description of the user type

displayName.description: The human-readable name of the user type

id.description: The unique key for the user type

lastUpdated.description: A timestamp from when the user type was most recently updated

lastUpdatedBy.description: The user ID of the most recent account to edit the user type

name.description: The name of the user type. The name must start with A-Z or a-z and contain only A-Z, a-z, 0-9, or underscore (_) characters. This value becomes read-only after creation and can't be updated.

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
